description: ImgBB is an image hosting service for uploading and sharing images and albums. Its public API documentation describes an API for uploading images and returning hosted image URLs and deletion links.
summary: ImgBB exposes one public developer integration surface: a REST-style HTTP API at `https://api.imgbb.com/1` for image uploads, authenticated with an ImgBB-issued API key passed as the `key` query parameter.
